blocks.text: Match preview: Bahamas face Belize in 1st Match (T20) on Sun, 21 Jun, 2026, 6:30 pm at White Hill Field, Sandys Parish Hamilton. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.

rows: ICC Mens T20 World Cup Americas Sub Regional Qualifier 2026
White Hill Field, Sandys Parish Hamilton

blocks.text: Standard T20 surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 160–180 runs par score.
Variable conditions · High 25°C / Low 23°C · Rain: 13.1 mm · Wind: up to 37 km/h. Rain likely — DLS may apply; favour bowlers who hit the deck and teams with depth.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
